name: @looprun-bench/atlas-v0.6.1
author: LoopRun Team
description: Atlas benchmark — edition v0.6.1 (looprun@0.6.1). Standalone patch edition: the frozen per-edition harness plays the v0.6.0-inherited subject through this edition's P9-patched governed specs + the ungoverned control arm, then judges + scores. Pins target the looprun@0.6.1 release (publishing imminently).
